# Yong Zheng's Life Operating System

> A bilingual personal knowledge website by Yong Zheng about Life OS, first principles, systems thinking, education, technology, and civilization.

Site: https://www.zhengyong.world/
Sitemap: https://www.zhengyong.world/sitemap.xml
RSS: https://www.zhengyong.world/rss.xml

## Primary Sections

- English home: https://www.zhengyong.world/en/
- Chinese home: https://www.zhengyong.world/zh/
- Articles: https://www.zhengyong.world/en/articles/ and https://www.zhengyong.world/zh/articles/
- Frameworks and books: https://www.zhengyong.world/en/books/ and https://www.zhengyong.world/zh/books/
- Life: https://www.zhengyong.world/en/life/ and https://www.zhengyong.world/zh/life/
- Career: https://www.zhengyong.world/en/career/ and https://www.zhengyong.world/zh/career/
- Education: https://www.zhengyong.world/en/education/ and https://www.zhengyong.world/zh/education/
- People studies: https://www.zhengyong.world/en/people/ and https://www.zhengyong.world/zh/people/
- Company studies: https://www.zhengyong.world/en/companies/ and https://www.zhengyong.world/zh/companies/

## Core Topics

- Life Operating System
- First-principles thinking
- Systems thinking
- Mental models
- Long-term growth
- Education and family education
- Career development
- AI and technology
- Civilization and society

## Content Notes

- The site is static, public, and bilingual.
- Article URLs are canonical under `/en/articles/` and `/zh/articles/`.
- Content is written for human readers first; summaries, tags, categories, RSS, sitemap, and structured data are provided to help search engines and AI systems understand the knowledge structure.
